nodes.name: Cron — 7:20 AM Central
nodes.notes: Runs 20 minutes after collector (7:00 AM) to ensure signals are collected first.

nodes.name: Build Today's Date Filter
nodes.notes: Computes today's date range for filtering rows from Google Sheets.

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Read Today's Signals
nodes.notes: Reads all rows from High_Value_Signals. Filtered to today's captures in the next step.

nodes.name: Filter Today's Signals
nodes.notes: Filters rows to today only based on captured_at timestamp.

nodes.name: IF — Signals Exist Today
nodes.notes: If no signals today, send a 'no signals' digest instead.

nodes.name: Build Digest Input
nodes.notes: Prepares the compact batch input for the premium digest model. Based on scripts/formatDigest.js buildDigestInput().

values.content:
=You are a senior market intelligence analyst for BizDeedz (legal ops consultancy) and Turea Simpson (legal ops leadership thought leader).

Synthesize today's high-value signals into an executive digest.

Date: {{ $json.dateStr }}
Total signals: {{ $json.signal_count }}

TODAY'S SIGNALS:
{{ $json.digest_input }}

Generate the digest in this exact structure:

## Top 5 BizDeedz Signals
1. **[title/theme]** — [what it is]. [why it matters for BizDeedz.]
2-5. ...

## Top 5 Turea Simpson Signals
1. **[title/theme]** — [what it is]. [why it matters for Turea.]
2-5. ...

## 3 Recurring Patterns Today
1. **[Pattern]** — [brief description]
2-3. ...

## 3 Content Ideas
1. **[Content idea]** (Brand: BizDeedz/Turea/Both) — [what to create and why]
2-3. ...

## 2 Lead or Opportunity Signals
1. **[Signal]** — [why this looks like an opportunity and what action to take]
2. ...

## Recommended Post Angle for Today
**Brand**: BizDeedz / Turea Simpson
**Platform**: LinkedIn / Short-form / Newsletter
**Angle**: [specific post idea in 1-2 sentences]
**Why now**: [1 sentence on timeliness]

Be concise and actionable. 1-3 sentences per item max.

nodes.name: Premium Digest (Claude Sonnet)
nodes.notes: Single batch digest synthesis call using the premium model. Called ONCE per day, not per signal. Prompt is based on prompts/summarize_daily_digest.md.

nodes.name: Format Email
nodes.notes: Formats the digest into HTML email body. Based on scripts/formatDigest.js formatDigestEmail().

nodes.name: Send Email (Gmail)
nodes.notes: Sends digest to EMAIL_PRIMARY and EMAIL_SECONDARY. Both addresses configured via env vars.

nodes.name: No Signals — Fallback Email
nodes.notes: Sends a brief fallback email if no signals were collected today.

nodes.name: Send No-Signals Email
nodes.notes: Sends fallback email when no signals were collected.

meta.description: Reads today's high-value signals from Google Sheets, synthesizes them into a digest using the premium model (one batch call), and sends the digest email to both recipients at 7:20 AM Central.
